message:
fix: preserve dependency metadata in JSONL backups (GH#2487)

Export now includes the metadata column from dependencies table.
Restore handles both new format (with metadata) and old format
(without metadata, defaults to {}). Prevents loss of gate config,
spawner_id, and other dependency metadata during backup/restore cycles.

Co-Authored-By: turian <turian@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
